questions.text: Who built the ark?
questions.explanation: Noah built the ark according to God's instructions before the great flood.

questions.text: How many days and nights did it rain during the flood?
questions.explanation: It rained for 40 days and 40 nights according to Genesis 7:12.

questions.text: Who was the first king of Israel?
questions.explanation: Saul was the first king of Israel, anointed by the prophet Samuel.

questions.text: Who killed Goliath?
questions.explanation: David killed the Philistine giant Goliath with a sling and a stone.

questions.text: Which of the following is NOT one of the Ten Commandments?
options: You shall have no other gods before me
questions.explanation: "Love your neighbor as yourself" is an important commandment taught by Jesus, but not part of the original Ten Commandments given to Moses.

questions.text: How many books are in the Old Testament?
questions.explanation: The Old Testament consists of 39 books in the standard Protestant Bible.

questions.text: How many apostles did Jesus choose?
questions.explanation: Jesus chose 12 apostles as his closest followers.

questions.text: What was Jesus' first miracle recorded in the Gospel of John?
questions.explanation: Jesus' first recorded miracle in John was turning water into wine at the wedding in Cana.

questions.text: Who betrayed Jesus?
questions.explanation: Judas Iscariot betrayed Jesus for 30 pieces of silver.

questions.text: Who denied knowing Jesus three times?
questions.explanation: Peter denied knowing Jesus three times, as Jesus had predicted.

questions.text: Which of the following books is NOT part of the New Testament?
questions.explanation: Isaiah is a book from the Old Testament. The others are all New Testament books.

questions.text: Who wrote the majority of the New Testament letters?
questions.explanation: Paul is credited with writing at least 13 of the 27 books in the New Testament.

questions.text: On which island was John when he wrote the book of Revelation?
questions.explanation: John was exiled on the island of Patmos when he received the vision of Revelation.

questions.text: Which disciple is often called 'the disciple whom Jesus loved'?
questions.explanation: John is referred to as 'the disciple whom Jesus loved' in the Gospel of John.

questions.text: Who was thrown into a lions' den but survived?
questions.explanation: Daniel was thrown into a lions' den for praying to God instead of the king, but God protected him.

questions.text: Which prophet was taken up to heaven in a whirlwind with a chariot and horses of fire?
questions.explanation: Elijah was taken up to heaven in a whirlwind, accompanied by a chariot and horses of fire.

questions.text: In Proverbs, what is said to be 'the beginning of wisdom'?
questions.explanation: Proverbs 9:10 states, 'The fear of the LORD is the beginning of wisdom.'

questions.text: Which book contains the verse 'For God so loved the world that he gave his one and only Son'?
questions.explanation: John 3:16 is one of the most well-known verses in the Bible.

questions.text: Which prophet saw the vision of the valley of dry bones?
questions.explanation: Ezekiel had the vision of the valley of dry bones coming back to life in Ezekiel 37.

questions.text: Where was Jesus born?
questions.explanation: Jesus was born in Bethlehem, as prophesied in the Old Testament.
